'''mojasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stadtholderian|stadtholderian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stadtholderian|stadtholderian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mojasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mojasithi|mojasithi]] || [[word:mojasiji|mojasiji]] || [[word:mojasishi|mojasishi]] || [[word:mojasiki|mojasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mojasuthuthu|mojasuthuthu]] || [[word:mojasujuju|mojasujuju]] || [[word:mojasushushu|mojasushushu]] || [[word:mojasukuku|mojasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mojasuthu|mojasuthu]] || [[word:mojasuju|mojasuju]] || [[word:mojasushu|mojasushu]] || [[word:mojasuku|mojasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mojasufthuf|mojasufthuf]] || [[word:mojasufjuf|mojasufjuf]] || [[word:mojasufshuf|mojasufshuf]] || [[word:mojasufkuf|mojasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mojasethe|mojasethe]] || [[word:mojaseje|mojaseje]] || [[word:mojaseshe|mojaseshe]] || [[word:mojaseke|mojaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mojasothotho|mojasothotho]] || [[word:mojasojojo|mojasojojo]] || [[word:mojasoshosho|mojasoshosho]] || [[word:mojasokoko|mojasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mojasotho|mojasotho]] || [[word:mojasojo|mojasojo]] || [[word:mojasosho|mojasosho]] || [[word:mojasoko|mojasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mojasofthof|mojasofthof]] || [[word:mojasofjof|mojasofjof]] || [[word:mojasofshof|mojasofshof]] || [[word:mojasofkof|mojasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfthÃŸf|mojasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfjÃŸf|mojasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfshÃŸf|mojasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfkÃŸf|mojasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|mojasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|mojasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|mojasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|mojasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfthÃŸf|mojasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfjÃŸf|mojasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfshÃŸf|mojasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfkÃŸf|mojasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfthÃŸf|mojasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfjÃŸf|mojasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfshÃŸf|mojasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mojasÃŸfkÃŸf|mojasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mojasÃḊthÃḊ|mojasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:mojasÃḊjÃḊ|mojasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:mojasÃḊshÃḊ|mojasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:mojasÃḊkÃḊ|mojasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mojasathatha|mojasathatha]] || [[word:mojasajaja|mojasajaja]] || [[word:mojasashasha|mojasashasha]] || [[word:mojasakaka|mojasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mojasatha|mojasatha]] || [[word:mojasaja|mojasaja]] || [[word:mojasasha|mojasasha]] || [[word:mojasaka|mojasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mojasafthaf|mojasafthaf]] || [[word:mojasafjaf|mojasafjaf]] || [[word:mojasafshaf|mojasafshaf]] || [[word:mojasafkaf|mojasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mojasasha|mojasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mojashÃḋsha|mojashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mojasrosha|mojasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mojasmusha|mojasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mojasyasha|mojasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomojasnkshÃḋsha|gomojasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomojasnkrosha|gomojasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomojasnkmusha|gomojasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomojasnkyasha|gomojasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mojajasasha|mojajasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mojajashÃḋsha|mojajashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mojajasrosha|mojajasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mojajasmusha|mojajasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mojajasyasha|mojajasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomojajasnkshÃḋsha|gomojajasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomojajasnkrosha|gomojajasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomojajasnkmusha|gomojajasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomojajasnkyasha|gomojajasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mejÃḊsasha|mejÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mejÃḊshÃḋsha|mejÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mejÃḊsrosha|mejÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mejÃḊsmusha|mejÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mejÃḊsyasha|mejÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomejÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|gomejÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomejÃḊsnkrosha|gomejÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomejÃḊsnkmusha|gomejÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomejÃḊsnkyasha|gomejÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mojfasasha|mojfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mojfashÃḋsha|mojfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mojfasrosha|mojfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mojfasmusha|mojfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mojfasyasha|mojfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomojfasnkshÃḋsha|gomojfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomojfasnkrosha|gomojfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomojfasnkmusha|gomojfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomojfasnkyasha|gomojfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
